Bash(R:/winrapids/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import sys, tempfile, os, json
sys.path.insert\(0, 'R:/winrapids/src'\)
sys.path.insert\(0, 'R:/fintek'\)
import numpy as np
import cupy as cp
from pathlib import Path

from trunk.backends.winrapids_fused.write import write_validated

print\('=== WinRapids write_validated test ==='\)

tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp\(\)
rng = np.random.default_rng\(42\)
n = 10_000

output_data = {
    'delta_rel_D01': cp.asarray\(rng.standard_normal\(n\)\),
    'delta_rel_D02': cp.asarray\(rng.standard_normal\(n\)\),
    'delta_rel_D03': cp.asarray\(rng.standard_normal\(n\)\),
}

out_path = Path\(tmpdir\) / '2026-03-20' / 'AAPL' / 'P03_delta_rel.parquet'

manifest = write_validated\(
    output_data,
    out_path,
    leaf_id='P03_delta_rel',
    ticker='AAPL',
    day='2026-03-20',
    version='1.0.0',
\)

assert manifest is not None
print\(f'rows: {manifest.rows}, columns: {manifest.columns}'\)
print\(f'write_ms: {manifest.write_ms}'\)
print\(f'bytes_parquet: {manifest.bytes_parquet:,}'\)
print\(f'compression_ratio: {manifest.compression_ratio}'\)

manifest_path = out_path.with_suffix\('.manifest.json'\)
assert manifest_path.exists\(\)
mdata = json.loads\(manifest_path.read_text\(\)\)
assert mdata['rows'] == n
assert mdata['columns'] == 3
print\(f'manifest.json: {len\(mdata\)} keys'\)

import pyarrow.parquet as pq
pf = pq.ParquetFile\(str\(out_path\)\)
assert pf.metadata.num_rows == n
assert pf.metadata.num_columns == 3
print\(f'parquet validated: {pf.metadata.num_rows} rows, {pf.metadata.num_columns} cols'\)

import shutil
shutil.rmtree\(tmpdir\)

print\('write_validated: PASS'\)
" 2>&1)
